agreement_points: All three judges assign a High overall risk tier.
disagreement_points: The judges emphasize different risk clusters across technical, governance, and operational perspectives.
One or more judge modules returned fallback outputs because their primary evaluation path failed.
arbitration_notes: The critique round uses a confidence-weighted reconciliation across all participating judges rather than a fixed Judge 1 vs Judge 2 comparison.
Because the score spread is limited, the reconciled score stays close to the confidence-weighted council average.
Fallback or low-confidence outputs were downweighted, but their concerns were still retained in the disagreement log.
critique_round.recommended_action: Escalate to human review after reconciling the combined technical, governance, and operational concerns.

synthesis_output.disagreement_summary: Two of three judges align on a High risk tier, but at least one judge diverges on severity or emphasis. The judges emphasize different risk clusters across technical, governance, and operational perspectives. One or more judge modules returned fallback outputs because their primary evaluation path failed.
synthesis_output.rationale: The final synthesis blends all three validated judge scores with the council critique/arbitration round. The critique reconciled the council at 58/100 (High), while the confidence-weighted blended council score is 58/100 (High). The critique round uses a confidence-weighted reconciliation across all participating judges rather than a fixed Judge 1 vs Judge 2 comparison. Because the score spread is limited, the reconciled score stays close to the confidence-weighted council average.
next_actions: Escalate the case to a human governance board for adjudication of the highest-risk concerns.
Do not approve deployment until the combined technical, governance, and operational issues are resolved.
